title: CobbledExpCrafting [Cobblemon]
description: CobbledExpCrafting allows EXP Candies for Cobblemon to be crafted directly in the Crafting Table instead of being cooked in a campfire. This makes production faster and fully automatable.
body:
# CobbledExpCrafting 🍬⚡

**Faster progression. Better automation. No Campfire Pot required.**

CobbledExpCrafting is a lightweight datapack for **Cobblemon** that replaces campfire-based EXP Candy crafting with direct Crafting Table recipes. This allows full automation support and significantly improves production efficiency in modern modded setups.

If you prefer streamlined gameplay and technical builds, this datapack is the perfect addition to your world or modpack.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🧪 Craft all EXP Candies in the Crafting Table  
- 🔁 Fully automation-compatible  
- ⚡ Faster and more convenient than Campfire Pot cooking  
- 🪶 Lightweight and performance-friendly  
- 🛠 Easy drag-and-drop installation  
- 🌍 Works in singleplayer and on servers  

---

## 📋 Candy Recipe List 🍬

### Exp. Candy S:  
![Crafting Exp. Candy S](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ffe26ce82ff5dbdfd2ed36e699186a5c8a2bc04.png)

### Exp. Candy M:  
![Crafting Exp. Candy M](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7229577d6328dd6f36c4e5f5519ad49f0a6e8627.png)

### Exp. Candy L:  
![Crafting Exp. Candy L](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011d4ef28df27f7c5c63e0778fcbacfdbf530895.png)

### Exp. Candy XL:  
![Crafting Exp. Candy XL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c6fefa7a0ee1094f6ba259ba99e0e5ee41cb4d.png)

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the datapack  
2. Place it inside your world’s `datapacks` folder  
3. Reload the world with `/reload`  
4. Start crafting!

No configuration required.
